app.title: Hermes Workspace
lang.toggle.label: Language
chat.empty.title: Start a new conversation.
chat.empty.subtitle: Your messages and the agent's reply will appear here.
chat.empty.suggest.1: Summarize the key points in my workspace files
chat.empty.suggest.2: Which skills can help me right now?
chat.empty.check.bind: Bind an upstream API key before chatting can call a model
chat.empty.check.model: No model selected — open the model picker or check your key
composer.placeholder: Start with any idea… Shift ↵ for a new line…
composer.menu.title: Tools
composer.model.title: Choose model
composer.model.empty: No models — bind your API key in Settings.
composer.filePicker.title: Choose from files
attach.preview.title: File preview
actions.share.title: Hermes reply
reasoning.title: Thinking
tool.args.heading: Arguments
tool.result.heading: Result
command.popover.heading: Commands
command.help.title: Available commands
convo.search.label: Search conversations
convo.archived.title: Archived
keymodal.heading.first: Sign in with your API key
keymodal.sub.first: Paste the API key your administrator issued from the new-api gateway.
keymodal.sub.expired: Your session is no longer valid. Paste your API key to continue.
keymodal.help: Don't have a key yet? Ask your administrator. Keys are issued and billed through the upstream gateway, not here.
keymodal.error.invalid_key: That API key was rejected by the upstream gateway. Check it for typos or ask your admin for a new one.
keymodal.error.upstream_unreachable: The upstream gateway is unreachable right now. Try again in a moment.
keymodal.error.misconfigured: The server can't reach the configured upstream URL. Ask your administrator to check the new-api configuration.
settings.account.title: Account
settings.not_signed_in: Not signed in. Return to chat and send a message to sign in with your API key.
settings.preferences.title: Preferences
settings.preferences.theme.hint: System follows your OS setting. Light and Dark override it.
settings.dialog.title: System settings
settings.dialog.subtitle: General preferences, account, and model settings.
settings.preferences.font.hint: Affects the chat column (messages and composer) only.
settings.bindKey.goTab: Bind or replace your upstream key in:
settings.bindKey.updateHint: Paste a new new-api key to replace the current one. It is validated before save; invalid keys are rejected.
settings.bindKey.validateNote: The plaintext key is never shown again; it is encrypted at rest.
settings.billing.title: Balance & usage
settings.billing.needKey: Bind a valid API key first.
settings.billing.name: Token name
settings.password.title: Change password
settings.models.hint: Select models you use often. The chat picker will only list these; leave empty to show the full catalog.
settings.about.title: About this service
settings.about.body: Authentication and billing are handled by the upstream new-api gateway. Your API key was issued by your administrator; to request more capacity or a new key, contact them directly. This interface only stores the cookie session — your key is encrypted at rest and never displayed back.
auth.title: Hermes Workspace
auth.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to start working with your AI agent.
auth.legacyKey: Sign in with API key instead
files.hint: Folders and files share one list. Documents can be indexed for search.
files.upload.tip: Upload and build a retrieval index (RAG)
files.uploadStoreOnly.tip: Store the file; index later when needed
files.uploadImage.tip: Images are stored only — not indexed for RAG
files.ingest.tip: Build a retrieval index for this file
files.rename.hint: Change the display name (keep a valid extension).
files.deleteConfirm.title: Delete file
files.folders.new.hint: Create a folder in the current directory.
files.folders.deleteWarn.title: Folder is not empty
files.folders.deleteWarn.body: "{name}" contains {files} file(s) and {folders} subfolder(s). Confirm to permanently delete everything inside.
files.tags.pageHint: Create or delete tags, and assign tags to a chosen file.
files.tags.assign.hint: Pick a file, then toggle tags on or off.
files.sort.name: Name
files.col.name: Name
skills.toast.enabled: Skill enabled — applies to later chats
memory.intro: Edit what the agent remembers about you. Changes apply on the next turn.
skills.hint: Enable skills, browse the global catalog, and add copies to your workspace to evolve them.
skills.mine.empty: No personal skills yet. Install from the library or create one.
skills.catalog.hint: Operator-curated skills. Install a copy into your workspace before evolving it.
skills.catalog.empty: No global skills are available yet.
skills.detail.empty: Select a skill to preview SKILL.md.
skills.detail.userHint: This is your private copy. Ask the agent to evolve it with web_skill_patch / web_skill_edit.
skills.createHint: New skills live only in your workspace.
settings.bindKey.title: Bind API key
settings.bindKey.hint: Paste the new-api key issued by your administrator to enable chat.
bindBanner.message: Bind your upstream API key before chatting — billing and LLM access go through new-api.
bindBanner.chatHint: Chat is disabled until you bind an API key.
onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.bind.hint: Paste the new-api key from your administrator. Chat and billing go through this upstream gateway.
onboarding.files.hint: Upload PDF, DOCX, or text files so the agent can search your knowledge base.
onboarding.chat.hint: You're all set. Open the chat page and send your first message to the agent.
